evals.expected_output: Fetches PR metadata and diff, generates inline comments and a summary review, presents them to the user, and waits for approval before posting.

evals.prompt: Can you check my pull request at https://contoso.visualstudio.com/TeamProject/_git/WebApp/pullrequest/456 and leave some inline comments? Focus on potential bugs.
evals.expected_output: Fetches the PR, reviews with emphasis on bug detection, generates actionable inline comments, asks for approval, and posts only after user confirms.

evals.prompt: I need a code review for an Azure PR. Here's the link: https://dev.azure.com/acme/Platform/_git/backend/pullrequest/789. Please look at security and performance issues.
evals.expected_output: Fetches PR info, filters for security and performance concerns, generates focused inline comments and summary, presents for approval, then posts to ADO.
